case_title: STURDY CREDIT UNION VS. DANIEL ALLARD

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT ALLARD, DANIEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLARD, DANIEL $8,864.11 PRINCIPAL, $2,625.69 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,789.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION SERVED MAR-24-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLARD, DANIEL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON APR-24-2008 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT ALLARD, DANIEL OEX HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-2008 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPEARANCE AND EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STURDY CREDIT UNION SERVED JUN-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLARD, DANIEL
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DANIEL ALLARD ON AUG-18-2008IS VACATED AT THE REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.(PETITIONER FILED UNDER CHAPTER 7)
